findings.summary: Effect<out A, out E = never, out R = never> — all covariant. Def.execute uses Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>> = Effect<ExecuteResult<M>, never, never>. Tools return Effect<..., never, Services>. Covariant R means Services is NOT subtype of never → TS2345 on Tool.define().
82 total TS2345 errors: ~14 source tool files + 1 app-runtime.ts + 3 v2/session.ts + ~64 test files. Primary fix changes Def.execute R from never to any, fixing ~78 errors.
EffectBridge.make() captures full Effect context and provides all services at runtime via Effect.provide(ctx). R parameter is purely type-level — no runtime behavior change from any fix.
app-runtime.ts error is separate Layer.provideMerge type inference issue. v2/session.ts errors are SQLite→Pg migration debt, unrelated to Effect layer types.
